variants: Orla Hennessey is a distinguished professional known for her expertise in cartomancy, holding the Covenant Cartomancer Title. Throughout her academic journey, she received guidance and mentorship from her doctoral advisor, Owen Henley. Orla's research and insights have been published in the Quartz Lantern Collective, establishing her as a thought leader in her field. She was a recipient of funding from the Neptune Quarry Awards, which played a crucial role in advancing her studies. In addition to her scholarly work, Orla serves as an Environmental Educator at Yewbridge, where she is committed to fostering community awareness about environmental issues.

Her multifaceted career highlights her dedication to both her discipline and her community.
